# 2048 Game

> A clean, open-source 2048 puzzle game in the browser. Slide tiles, merge same numbers, reach 2048 — or push further to 4096, 8192, 16384, 32768, 65536, 131072, 262144, 524288. No install, no ads, no account.

A faithful reimplementation of the classic 2048 by Gabriele Cirulli, with optional higher-tier targets (4096 through 524288) for players who want a real challenge. Built as a single static bundle deployable to any CDN.

## Core features

- [Play 2048](https://2048.harunon.club/): Free 2048 puzzle game in the browser. Move tiles with arrow keys, WASD, or touch swipe.
- [Game modes 2048–524288](https://2048.harunon.club/): Switch target between 2048 (classic), 4096, 8192, 16384, 32768, 65536, 131072, 262144, or 524288. Higher modes require exponentially more skill.
- [Bilingual UI](https://2048.harunon.club/): English and Japanese interface.
- [Persistent best score](https://2048.harunon.club/): Best score is saved to localStorage and persists across sessions on the same device.
- [Share results](https://2048.harunon.club/): After a game ends, share your score to X (Twitter) or copy the result to clipboard.
- [Responsive design](https://2048.harunon.club/): Works on desktop (keyboard) and mobile (touch swipe).
- [Privacy-respecting analytics](https://2048.harunon.club/): Self-hosted Umami analytics, no third-party cookies, no fingerprinting, no account required.

## How to play

1. Use the arrow keys (or WASD) to slide all tiles in one direction
2. Tiles with the same number merge when they collide
3. Each merge adds the merged value to your score
4. A new tile (2 or 4) spawns after every move
5. Reach 2048 (or your selected target) to win
6. Game over when the board fills up with no possible merges

## Higher-tier tips

- 2048 is achievable in a few minutes for new players
- 4096 requires planning 3-4 moves ahead
- 8192+ requires keeping one corner free and building a chain
- 65536+ has been done by fewer than 1% of players globally

## FAQ

- Is it free? Yes, no ads, no premium tier, no paywall.
- Do I need to install anything? No, it's a single static bundle.
- Does it work offline? Once the page is loaded, yes.
- Is my data sent anywhere? No, only your best score is stored in your browser.
- What's the highest tile? 524288. No one has confirmed a real solve.
- Is this the official 2048? No, this is a fan-made open-source reimplementation. The original 2048 is at [play2048.co](https://play2048.co).

## Open source

- [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/harunonsystem/2048-game): MIT licensed.
- [Issue tracker](https://github.com/harunonsystem/2048-game/issues): Bug reports and feature requests.
